hero.badge: 700 tonnes of plastic enter Greek waters every year
hero.headline: We are building the fleet to <accent>stop it.</accent>
hero.body: CleanBeaches Greece deploys mechanical cleaning fleets, coordinates volunteer operations, and publishes every result. Transparent. Measurable. Unstoppable.

impact.headline: We track every kilogram we collect.
impact.body: Metrics update after each operation and sync to the public dashboard.

metrics.label: Plastic removed
metrics.description: Pilot phase across Attica, Cyclades, and Sporades (2024 data).

metrics.label: Custom machines
metrics.description: Tracked sifters adapted to rocky/pebble beaches.

howItWorks.headline: Three steps to cleaner beaches
howItWorks.body: No experience needed. Join hundreds of volunteers making a measurable difference across the Greek islands.

steps.title: Report a site
steps.description: Spot pollution on a beach? Drop a pin on our map. Your report helps us prioritize where to deploy cleaning crews next.

steps.title: Join a cleanup
steps.description: Sign up for the next event. We provide equipment, insurance, and transport. Just show up ready to make a difference.

steps.title: Track your impact
steps.description: Every kilogram is weighed and logged. Get your personal impact certificate and watch the cumulative results grow.

cta.label: Sign up for the next cleanup

operations.headline: Live programs across the islands.
operations.body: Each cleanup combines municipal funding, CSR sponsors, and volunteer task forces. We publish outcomes within 48 hours.

items.description: Tracked sifters handle pebbles while dive teams remove abandoned fishing gear around the cliffs.
Night operation to avoid daytime visitors, targeting microplastics using UV-tracked sieving.
Weekend blitz with local hotels funding logistics and glass separation for recycling.

socialProof.headline: Trusted by volunteers, municipalities, and partners

testimonials.quote: I signed up on a whim during my holiday in Milos. Three hours later I had helped remove 120 kg of fishing nets. I have never felt more connected to a place.
testimonials.name: Eleni K.

testimonials.quote: CleanBeaches gave Paros something no municipal budget could: a transparent, measurable system that our citizens actually trust. The data they publish has helped us secure EU funding.
testimonials.name: Dimitris P.

testimonials.quote: We sponsor dozens of environmental initiatives. CleanBeaches is the only one that sends us verified, per-kilogram impact reports. Our board renewed the partnership unanimously.
testimonials.name: Anna M.

gallery.headline: See the difference in every operation.

photos.title: Batsi Harbour, Andros
photos.description: Mechanical sifter removed 2.1 tons of plastic pellets after a cargo spill.

photos.title: Vouliagmeni Sunset Sweep
photos.description: Night operation targeting microplastics without disturbing beach bars.

photos.title: Naoussa Fisher Gear Exchange
photos.description: Fishing cooperatives trading ghost nets for recycling credits.

photos.title: Sarakiniko Before / After
photos.description: Combined volunteer + machine sweep ahead of tourist season.

photos.title: Chania Posidonia Defense
photos.description: Custom rake preserves sea grass while lifting heavy litter.

photos.title: Skiathos Runway Beach
photos.description: Partnership with airport authority to clean approach-side shoreline.

partners.headline: Backed by municipalities, foundations, and industry leaders

donations.headline: Pick an impact level.
donations.body: Recurring sponsors receive telemetry packets, receipts, and brand placement on machines.

ctaSection.headline: Every day without action, another 1.9 tonnes enters the Aegean.
ctaSection.body: Donations activate machinery leases, pay machine operators, and cover POSIDONIA-safe disposal. We publish every receipt and outcome in the transparency dashboard.
ctaSection.counterLabel: plastic entered Greek waters since you opened this page

volunteer.headline: Be part of the next cleanup
volunteer.body: Sign up to receive SMS deploy alerts, logistics briefings, and post-operation transparency decks. We coordinate with municipalities so every action is permitted, insured, and safe.

form.disclaimer: We will never spam or sell your data. GDPR-compliant opt-out anytime.

roadmap.headline: Scaling from pilots to national coverage.

phases.title: Legal + Fleet Setup
phases.description: Finalize AMKE registration, procure first two sifters, onboard core ops team.

phases.title: Island Partnerships
phases.description: Multi-island agreements for recurring machine + volunteer cleanups.

phases.title: National Dashboard
phases.description: Public data portal with live KPIs, transparency docs, and open impact API.

newsletter.headline: Stay updated
newsletter.body: Get monthly impact reports and cleanup announcements.

footer.copyright: CleanBeaches Greece AMKE. All rights reserved.

gallery.headline: Every cleanup documented end-to-end.
gallery.body: Browse verified photo sets, drone imagery, and telemetry snapshots before they hit the transparency dashboard.

problem.headline: What we are up against.
problem.body: Real, unfiltered shots from the Greek coastline. Each upload feeds the case for mechanical fleets, municipal funding, and EU environmental interventions.

donate.headline: Direct your support into machines, crews, and transparency.
donate.body: This initial pledge form captures intent so we can route you to the correct payment flow (Stripe, SEPA, or municipal co-funding). A CleanBeaches team member will follow up with the full compliance packet.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Message / intent
fields.placeholder: Tell us about the coastline or program you want to underwrite

form.disclaimer: No payment is processed on this screen. We reply within one business day with the secure payment link.

legal.body: CleanBeaches Greece is legally conservative by design. These documents evolve as we progress through AMKE registration and begin public fundraising activities.
